pi_items.source: Task description claims superstore_orders.csv is used, but the file is absent from the environment data directory.
Referenced in task.json hooks.pre_task. File does not exist in the task directory.
Referenced in task.json hooks.post_task. File is missing (there is an export_result.sh which contains PowerShell code, but no .ps1 file).
Task description specifies to save as Customer_Retention.pbix. export_result script confirms this path.
Task description specifies to export to lost_customers.csv. export_result script confirms this path.
Task description mandates creating Calculated Table named Customer_Profiles. Confirmed in export script analysis logic.
Task description mandates these two calculated columns. export_result script confirms these exact names.
Task description specifies a Donut Chart and a Table visual. export_result script heuristically checks layout JSON for donutChart and tableEx/pivotTable.
Task description explicitly states a reference date of December 31, 2017 for calculating Recency_Days.

privileged_info_summary: The customer_retention_segmentation task is defective. It requires superstore_orders.csv as a data source (a real public dataset), but this file is missing from the environment. Additionally, the task hooks reference setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1, but neither file exists in the task directory (there is only a misnamed export_result.sh containing PowerShell code). Due to the missing setup script and data, the target Customer_Profiles table and segmentation logic (Recency_Days relative to 2017-12-31 and Status categorizations) cannot be implemented using the provided environment resources.
